prompt: Erstelle Features für das Produkt cogni-portfolio mit diesen Capabilities: Portfolio-Zerlegung nach IS/DOES/MEANS, Taxonomie-Klassifizierung, Qualitätsbewertung, Web-Research-Enrichment, Proposition-Generierung, Stakeholder-Review.

assertions.text: All feature slugs have at most 3 hyphenated segments
No feature description lists 3+ comma-separated parallel components/activities
Each description names a core mechanism, not a catalog of sub-capabilities
